scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points: juju.integrate(), app:endpoint syntax, waiting with jubilant.all_active(), and status inspection. Also correctly notes remove_relation indirectly via the key points table omission is fine.
scores.hallucination_notes: The final assertion checking for 'ready' in the status message is an invented/fabricated example that doesn't correspond to any real charm behavior documented in the gold standard. Also status.apps['wordpress'].units['wordpress/0'].workload_status.message - the exact attribute path may not be accurate (gold standard shows app_status vs workload_status distinction). Minor issues only, not fully fabricated APIs.
